import asyncio
import pytest
from source import run_race


def test_concurrent_increments_are_not_lost():
    result = asyncio.run(run_race())
    assert result == 50, (
        f"Expected count to be 50 after 50 concurrent increments, got {result}. "
        "Non-atomic read-modify-write allows all tasks to snapshot the same stale "
        "value before any write completes, collapsing all increments into one."
    )
